summary: Tested Tax Return Wizard implementation. All features working: wizard navigation, section statuses API, auto-save, 'Non Applicabile' option, 'Conferma e Prosegui' button, progress bar updates. Backend API tests: 13/13 passed. Frontend UI tests: All critical flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Wizard implementation is complete and functional
Auto-save with debounce (1.5s) working - toast 'Salvato automaticamente' appears
'Non Applicabile' feature working - sections can be marked as not applicable
'Conferma e Prosegui' button saves section and advances to next
Progress bar updates correctly (0% -> 8% -> 17% as sections are completed)
Stepper navigation shows correct section states (completed, in_progress, not_applicable, not_started)
Form validation prevents advancing without required fields
Signature canvas and consent checkbox present in final section
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 2024 Bozza declaration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Return Wizard fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Sequential section navigation (cannot skip), 2) 'Non Applicabile' option for optional sections, 3) Auto-save with 1.5s debounce, 4) Progress bar tracking, 5) Final signature with checkbox + canvas. API endpoint for section_statuses: PUT /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}/sections/section_statuses

wizard_navigation.notes: Stepper shows all sections, navigation works correctly

dati_personali_validation.notes: Required fields marked with asterisk, validation prevents advancing without completion

non_applicabile_option.notes: Sections can be marked as 'Non Applicabile', shows confirmation message and 'Modifica' button

conferma_e_prosegui.notes: Button saves section and advances to next, shows success toast

auto_save.notes: Auto-save triggers after 1.5s of inactivity, shows 'Salvato automaticamente' toast

progress_bar.notes: Progress percentage updates correctly as sections are completed
